signatureMove.name: Compressed Air
signatureMove.endStepEffect: This model suffers 1 Wd. All other models within 1" suffer 1 Wd then are moved 2" directly away.

abilities.name: The Faculty
abilities.description: If Old Polly, Prof Boffinsworth & Flinders Memphis are seen in this troupe at the start of the game, this character gains Rogue, Animal & Machine keywords.

abilities.name: Augments
abilities.description: Friendly characters with Reload [...] gain the Machine keyword.

abilities.name: Have You Tried Turning it Off and On Again?
abilities.description: After a friendly Machine sees an Arcane Hand, they may automatically suffer 1 Wd, shuffle the hand back into the Arcane Deck and redraw the same number of cards (Resist Hand is unchanged). Once per turn.

abilities.name: Overclock
abilities.description: Target other friendly Machine suffers 1 Wd then may take any action available to them which would normally have an energy cost of {2}. You may only target each character once per turn.

abilities.name: Gnomish Air Rifle
abilities.description: This ability cannot be used while this model is engaged.
